creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended

sure enough.  suspending this pr until patches from upstream, or IO-Socket-SSL updated. 

but, this isn't a FreeBSD ports issue, this is an upstream issue with smtp-cli (maybe), or IO-Socket-SSL.  

would love to see patches to smtp-cli if you have them. 

notes: 

confirmed smtp-cli works just fine with 1.59, and is broken with 1.74 

pkg_add http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/packages/7-scheidell_AMD64/All/p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.74.tbz 
Fetching http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/packages/7-scheidell_AMD64/All/p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.74.tbz... Done. 
pkg_add: warning: package 'p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.74' requires 'p5-Net-SSLeay-1.48', but 'p5-Net-SSLeay-1.42' is installed 
mx2# pkg_info | grep p5-IO-Socket 
p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.74 Perl5 interface to SSL sockets 
mx2# smtp-cli --from="scheidell@secnap.net" --to="michael.scheidell@secnap.com" --subject="test email from smtp-cli"  
--body-plain="this is just a test email with Upgrade of p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.53 to p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.59 complete"  
--server=localhost --user=blabla --pass=blabla2 --server=mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net
!!! File::Type -- optional module not found 
!!! Used for guessing MIME types of attachments 

!!! Use --missing-modules-ok if you don't need the above listed modules 
!!! and don't want to see this message again. 

invalid SSL_version specified at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.12.4/IO/Socket/SSL.pm line 308 

===>>> Updating dependency entry for p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.59 in each dependent port 
===>>> Installation of security/p5-IO-Socket-SSL (p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.59) complete 

mx2# smtp-cli --from="scheidell@secnap.net" --to="michael.scheidell@secnap.com" --subject="test email from smtp-cli"  
--body-plain="this is just a test email with Upgrade of p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.53 to p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.59 complete"  
--server=localhost --user=blabla --pass=blabla2 --server=mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net

!!! Used for guessing MIME types of attachments
